## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should happen instead.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens. Include error messages or screenshots.

## Environment

- **OS:** macOS / Linux / Windows
- **Node.js:** (run `node -v`)
- **pnpm:** (run `pnpm -v`)
- **Browser:** (if admin UI issue)
- **Gearu packages:**
  - `@gearu/core`: x.x.x
  - `@gearu/admin`: x.x.x

## Package Scope

Which package is affected?

- [ ] `@gearu/core`
- [ ] `@gearu/admin`
- [ ] `gearu` (CLI)
- [ ] `@gearu/plugin-analytics`
- [ ] `@gearu/plugin-leads`
- [ ] Other / Unsure

## Logs

```
Paste relevant console output, server logs, or network errors here.
```

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
